commit_message:
[i2c, rtl] SDA Interference fix [i2c, rtl] SDA Interference fix In Idle state, event_sda_interference will be raised only if host is enabled
Fix is needed for PR 4180

Signed-off-by: Igor Kouznetsov <igor.kouznetsov@wdc.com>
